import org.slf4j.*;

// Pin (a), fail closed: a wildcard import does not establish that Logger is
// org.slf4j.Logger (JLS package-type shadowing is not checkable source-only), so
// a wildcard-imported Logger is not recognized. Explicit imports are the norm.
class Slf4jWildcardImport {
    private final Logger log;

    Slf4jWildcardImport(Logger log) {
        this.log = log;
    }

    void wildcardIsNotTrusted() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            log.error("boom", e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
